home.title: Sukajan — Made to Stand Apart
home.subtitle: Over four years curating authentic Sukajan from trusted suppliers. No counterfeit pieces. Delivery in 7–10 days with direct 24/7 support.
home.introBody: Phi Truong personally checks and curates each product before it reaches the shop. Sukajan, bombers, hoodies and T-shirts must earn their place at random.phitruong.
home.whyTitle: Real quality. Direct advice. Clear commitments.
home.qualityBody: Products are selected from trusted suppliers. Every shipment is inspected by the shop before acceptance.
home.styleBody: East Asian embroidered Sukajan, limited bombers and oversized hoodies in small, non-mainstream selections.
home.deliveryBody: Estimated 7–10 days after deposit confirmation, with order progress shared throughout the journey.
home.supportBody: Chat through Zalo, Instagram or TikTok. Phi Truong provides the consultation directly, without scripted replies.
home.showcasePriceNote: Contact us directly to check pricing, sizing and availability.
home.showcaseTigerBlackAlt: Black and silver Sukajan with tiger and floral embroidery
home.showcaseDragonPurpleAlt: Purple and black Sukajan with twin dragon embroidery
home.showcaseTigerIvoryAlt: Ivory Sukajan with tiger and floral embroidery
home.processTitle: Six clear steps from choosing your jacket to receiving it.
home.step1Body: Browse the catalogue and select the right item and size.
home.step2Body: Contact Zalo or Instagram for free consultation.
home.step3Body: Confirm price, color, size and delivery estimate.
home.step4Body: The shop receives the deposit and places the supplier order.
home.step5Body: The item arrives in 7–10 days; pay the balance on delivery.
home.step6Body: Inspect the product and contact the shop immediately if needed.
home.socialBody: Real product videos, lookbooks, new arrivals and seasonal orders are updated regularly on Instagram and TikTok.

shop.title: Sukajan Order
shop.subtitle: Distinct silhouettes curated for each season.

product.orderNotice: Made to order - delivery in 7-10 days
product.changeWarning: Size and color cannot be changed after confirmation.
product.selectOptions: Please select a size and color.
product.internationalBody: Orders to Korea, Taiwan or Japan are handled through Zalo so shipping fees and customs details can be confirmed directly.

checkout.title: Confirm your order
checkout.deposit: 50% deposit via BIDV / Zalo, remaining 50% COD
checkout.successBody: The shop will review and confirm your order. Your order number is:
checkout.bankInstruction: Use the order number as the transfer reference. Send a screenshot through Zalo or Instagram for confirmation.
checkout.internationalCustoms: International orders require valid customs information (ID, passport or residence card depending on country). Shipping is quoted separately.
checkout.warning: Check your size carefully. International items cannot change size or color after shop confirmation.

request.title: Send the piece you are looking for
request.subtitle: Upload an inspiration image and the shop will source it and provide a quote.
request.successBody: The shop will review the item and contact you with a quote. Message Zalo for faster handling.

about.title: RANDOM.PHITRUONG — Four Years Built on Passion
about.lead: I am Phi Truong, the person behind random.phitruong.
about.story1: In 2022, I could not find a place in Vietnam that offered the Sukajan quality I wanted. Instead of waiting, I sourced it myself and connected directly with trusted suppliers.
about.story2: Since then, every item has passed through my hands before reaching a customer: checked, selected and approved. I do not sell something simply because it is available. I only order pieces I believe are worth wearing.
about.story3: Four years, 98K Instagram followers and 43K TikTok followers were not built by advertising alone. The shop continues to grow because customers return after their first purchase.
about.selectionTitle: Every item carries its own story
about.selectionBody: Sukajan, bomber jackets, hoodies and T-shirts are selected for material, embroidery, silhouette and how they feel to wear — not only for how they look in a photo.
about.promiseTitle: Advice from someone who knows the product
about.promiseBody: Message the shop whenever you need help. Phi Truong replies directly, confirms the product, size, color and price before ordering, and shares progress from deposit through delivery.

contact.title: Contact & support
contact.subtitle: Message directly to check availability, choose a size, request real photos or discuss international shipping. Support is available 24/7 through official channels.
contact.policyTitle: Clear terms before you place a deposit.
contact.depositPolicyBody: A 50% deposit is required after confirmation. It is non-refundable once the supplier order is placed. The shop refunds 100% if the item is unavailable or supplier-defective.
contact.deliveryPolicyBody: Estimated 7–10 business days after deposit confirmation. International transit may vary and the shop will provide updates.
contact.returnPolicyBody: Report defects or a wrong confirmed color/size within 48 hours. Changes of mind, customer sizing mistakes and used items are not eligible.
contact.paymentPolicyBody: Bank transfer and remaining-balance COD in Vietnam; ZaloPay and MoMo are available through direct consultation.
contact.name: Your name
contact.communityPlaceholder: Community links will be available soon.

footer.description: Over four years curating Sukajan and streetwear. Direct consultation, 7–10 day delivery and international support through Zalo.
footer.returns: Exchange defects or incorrect items within 48 hours
footer.refund: Full refund if unavailable or supplier-defective
footer.zaloBody: Get direct advice on products, sizing, colors and order status through Zalo.

account.title: My Account
account.signInRequiredBody: Please sign in to view your orders and consultation requests.
